title: ammophila arenaria
intro: Ammophila arenaria, also known as marram grass, is a perennial plant species native to coastal areas in Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of marram grass include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
